narrative:
Morgan Township has 1,285 registered voters, with 58.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a modest Republican lean of 2.3 percentage points.
